final:
module lfsr (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        lfsr_out <= 5'b00001;
    end else if (enable) begin
        lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[2]};
    end
end

endmodule
